2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

1 Jalen Williams

  • Position Shooting Guard
  • Height 6-2
  • Class Senior
  • Hometown Baton Rouge, La.
  • Highschool Madison Preparatory Academy

Biography

2025-26: Upgraded from the varsity roster from junior varsity.

High School: Prepped at Madison Preparatory Academy.

Personal: Majoring in health care management ... Born in Baton Rouge, La.
